text: The Russian military was directly behind a malicious cyber-attack on Ukraine that spread globally last year. While the June 2017 NotPetya ransomware attack masqueraded as a criminal enterprise, its purpose was principally to disrupt Ukraine. The attack was reckless and indiscriminate, and the UK government judged Russia's military to be responsible.
attribution_coding_note: Reports 'the UK government judged Russia's military to be responsible' for the attack.
